name: Brutal ADVENT
effect: +2 HP to all ADVENT troopers and officers for the duration.

name: Gatecrasher Protocol
description: ADVENT deploys additional soldiers in ambush missions.
effect: ADVENT ambush and retaliation missions spawn extra reinforcement pods.

name: Tactical Evolution
description: ADVENT soldiers are more aggressive and coordinated.
effect: ADVENT pods become more active during overwatch and engage faster.

name: Incoming
description: ADVENT increases its Avatar Project funding, advancing the doom clock.

name: Localized Power
description: ADVENT restricts power to the Avenger.
effect: One Avenger facility is randomly disabled for the duration.

name: Price of Progress
description: ADVENT propaganda increases civilian support costs.
effect: Intel cost for Covert Ops and some activities is increased.

name: Supply Denial
effect: Lose Supplies from an upcoming supply drop.

name: Not Dead Yet
description: Wounded ADVENT troops fight more stubbornly.
effect: ADVENT soldiers don't panic at low HP — they fight until killed.

name: Rapid Response
description: ADVENT deploys forces faster to defend facilities.
effect: Reinforcements arrive 1 turn earlier on timed missions.

name: Psychological Warfare
effect: Soldiers have reduced Will, making them more susceptible to panic and psionic attacks.

name: Hidden Threat
description: ADVENT plants sleeper agents near XCOM bases.
effect: Contact with a new region requires extra Intel or triggers a Resistance contact disruption.

name: Alien Facility Construction
description: ADVENT accelerates construction of a new alien facility.
effect: +1 Avatar Project pip if not countered by assaulting the facility in time.

name: Chosen Ambush
description: WotC: A Chosen has intelligence on XCOM's location and launches a targeted mission.
effect: A Chosen appears on a random mission this cycle with boosted knowledge.

name: Alien Cipher
description: WotC: The alien network encrypts XCOM intel channels.
effect: Covert Ops information is obscured; missions may not show soldier risk levels.

name: Retaliation Forces
description: WotC: ADVENT and Chosen coordinate a large retaliation strike.
effect: Next retaliation mission includes a Chosen and extra ADVENT soldiers.
